title: New Recipes
description: New recipes for crafting table, stone cutter and blast furnace
body:
# Important! 
**This data pack will not be updated for versions: [1.21.0] [1.21.1] [1.21.2] [1.21.3]. This is due to Mojang's silly changes regarding the creation of data packs. Otherwise, I would have to do a lot of useless and routine work. Let's hope that Mojang will not make any further changes. Thank you for your understanding!**


# List of all crafts
![Crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BKJQBufy/images/0dfdaddf39762241db2f21d49d64dd075533e699.png)

**Upd: Also. You can put clay in a campfire to get bricks!**

<details>
<summary>Recipes in a blast furnace</summary>

If a block of raw iron is placed in the blast furnace, then we will get a iron block at the output.

If a block of raw gold is placed in the blast furnace, then we will get a gold block at the output.

If a block of raw copper is placed in the blast furnace, then we will get a copper block at the output.

If rotten flesh is placed in a blast furnace, then at the output we will get leather.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Recipes in a stone cutter</summary>

If you put a block of amethyst in a stone cutter, we will get four amethyst shard at the output.

If you put a magma block in a stone cutter, we will get four magma cream at the output.

If you put a glowstone in a stone cutter, we will get four glowstone dust at the output.

If you put a honeycomb block in a stone cutter, we will get four honeycombs at the output.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Crafts on the crafting table</summary>

If there are 1 leather and 1 string the crafting table, then we will get a bundle at the output.

If there are 1 leather horse armor 5 diamond the crafting table, then we will get diamond horse armor at the output.

If there are 1 leather horse armor and 5 gold Ingot the crafting table, then we will get golden horse armor at the output.

If there are 1 leather horse armor and 5 iron Ingot the crafting table, then we will get iron horse armor at the output.

</details>
